name: DLP Resources Inc.
summary: MG Capital Corporation, an exploration-stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in British Columbia, Canada. It explores for lead, zinc, copper, and cobalt deposits. The company holds 100% interests in the Hungry Creek property that consists of 11 claims covering an area of 4261.5 hectares located on the west of Kimberley; Aldridge 1 property, which includes 9 claims covering an area of 2,914.43 hectares located on the southwest of Cranbrook; Aldridge 2 property that consists of 5 claims covering an area of 1,855.17 hectares located on the southwest of Cranbrook; and the Redburn Creek property comprising 12 claims blocks covering an area of 5,359.5 hectares located in the northeast of Golden. MG Capital Corporation is headquartered in Cranbrook, Canada.
